title: SO21 2QG, Acorn Bioenergy Operations Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BP3326SD/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Acorn Bioenergy Operations Limited   Installation name: Three Maids AD Plant   Permit number: EPR/BP3326SD/A001   "
